command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
python3 << PYFIX
content = open('runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py').read()

# Add build_executor_actions_wave1 to both import blocks
old1 = '        build_executor_actions,\n    )\nexcept ImportError:'
new1 = '        build_executor_actions,\n        build_executor_actions_wave1,\n    )\nexcept ImportError:'

old2 = '        build_executor_actions,\n    )\n\nACTIONS.update(build_executor_actions_wave1'
new2 = '        build_executor_actions,\n        build_executor_actions_wave1,\n    )\n\nACTIONS.update(build_executor_actions_wave1'

changed = 0
if old1 in content:
    content = content.replace(old1, new1, 1)
    changed += 1
    print('Fixed try-import block')
if old2 in content:
    content = content.replace(old2, new2, 1)
    changed += 1
    print('Fixed except-import block')
if changed == 0:
    print('WARNING: patterns not matched, trying generic approach')
    # Add the wave1 import after any existing build_executor_actions import line
    import re
    content = re.sub(
        r'(        build_executor_actions,\n)',
        r'\1        build_executor_actions_wave1,\n',
        content
    )
    print('Applied generic regex fix')

open('runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py', 'w').write(content)
print('Written')
PYFIX
python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py').read()); print('BRIDGE SYNTAX OK')"
python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); import runtime.moreno_operator_bridge; print('BRIDGE IMPORT OK')" 2>&1
ENDSSH
